---
title: ""
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

### S351 Slides and worksheet

Class (9/7): [Slides](Week1slides.pdf), [Worksheet](Worksheet1.pdf), [Worksheet 1 solution](worksheet1_solution.pdf) \

  
Class (9/14): [Slides](Week2slides.pdf), [Worksheet](Worksheet2.pdf), [Worksheet 2 solution](worksheet2_solution.pdf) \

Class (9/21): [Slides](Week3slides.pdf), [Worksheet](Worksheet3.pdf), [Worksheet 3 solution](worksheet3_solution.pdf) \

Class (9/28): [Slides](Week4slides.pdf), [Worksheet](Worksheet4.pdf), [Worksheet 4 solution (place holder)](worksheet3_solution.pdf) \
